review_title: Perfect Solution for Real Estate & Construction Companies
author: Arun K.
pros: They have specific solution for Real estate with a view of Graphical interface of Inventory Sold, booked and reserved along with great suite of Project Management tool that gets our day to day activities smoother all in control alerting the respective departments via proper notifications update and approvals that are required at all levels. CentraHub has a great Solution and have great team to work with. Special mention for [SENSITIVE CONTENT] who is instrumental in closing our Deal and also helped us in a successful implementation and API Training. CentraHub has Restful API's which is very easy to operate and connect with Third party applications that helped us to connect with our ERP and many other tools that we use for our internal purpose.
cons: User Interface need to be improved Default Integration Plugins with Property portals are very limited Workflow Graphical Interface View is a must for the kind of software that handles all complexities

author: Ratheesh C.
pros: We have field staff servicing real estate assets of our clients including maintenance contracts of PPM, ad-hoc maintenance and cleaning requests, and contracting jobs for one-off projects. We have a fleet of vehicles, tools, assets, and spares that we stock and mobilize for various jobs. Implementing CAFM enhanced our efficiencies and assured our customers of on-time service. The CAFM system ensured that our PPM commitment SLAs are always completed within recommended asset specifications. Customer retention went up owing to enhanced customer experiences. Our cash flow health improved owing to systemic tracking of dues and receivables with automated follow ups of payment receivables. We adopted the Centra CAFM system and have completely digitally transformed our operations. Our contracts, renewals, invoicing and follow ups are all driven by the pre-sales process of the Centra CAFM system. Once a sale is completed, the CAFM system automatically generates PPM service work orders and allocates them to technicians or sub contractors whoever is responsible for that location and bearing necessary skill sets. The call center receives breakdown or maintenance calls from customers and can generate reactive maintenance work orders which too can be allocated like the PPM work orders. Invoicing is automatically generated within the system and follow ups for payments are automated too.
cons: Software has no cons as of now. It meets all our requirements.

author: Hani B.
pros: The solution is more of a platform that you can build your processes and workflows upon. There are obvious best-practice templates to start off from, but if you really get invested in the implementation process of the solution you will discover endless possibilities to really make the software work for you and not the other way around. We were able to digitize almost all of our processes (even ones that are administrative in nature), streamlining all our work. Most software has limited quick-customizable options, whereby deeper customizations require significant time/money to achieve. With Centra products, the platform is built with customization at the core, allowing you to customize way beyond any other software product at very efficient time/cost levels.
cons: Although functionality customization is quite extensive, interface customization is a bit limited. Considering that the solutions are mainly internal facing, this is not a big deal. In all fairness there has been some recent improvements on that front.

review_title: Good CRM, Customizable to great extent.
description: It is good, dynamic changes of system are good. Building system requirement phase is very crucial. At times support is delayed, you have to be on top of them for the same.

description: Yes, its good except about the least like I explained above. we are planning to use it for our other sales medium also.
author: Zainul A.
pros: Ease of user, flexibility to provide in depth rights to mould the system as per needs i.e. customization. Admin rights are second things which is so much empowered and very much capable to tackle day to day future requirement.
cons: Dashboard which needs to be improved significantly. Actually, talking about Dashboard i am totally disappointed as compare to CentraHub overall features. Like there are many other chart option to depicts our analysis which we used to do in Ms Excel, Tableu etc but not available in Centra Hub. In fact Tableau is other thing if we want to have some option related to charting option which are available in Ms Excel but in this software. E.g nowa a days there are 2 parameters one can simply show the Pipline. 1. Value 2. Count (No. of opportunities). In Centra Hub if we take both Value and Quantity option then value bar is ok since it is in lakhs but if total no. of opportunities are 4 only then bar chart for 4 opportunity as quantity is not showing because both value and quantity are depended on same axis whereas in excel we can set two axis, one for value and another for quantity.

description: We signed on December 21, 2022, but we still haven't had our software ready. They promised to finish it in 45 days and took the full payment and a year's worth of payments for five users in advance, but they did nothing. Instead, they gave us the software that their current client in Dubai was already using, but our company is in India. These people are good, but they'll always be busy and only offer online service, which will cause a lot of disruption. The person they assigned to us doesn't understand the difference between square yards and square feet, a villa, and a plot most of which they made mandatory; when we ask them to remove them, they simply say that it isn't possible, as if it were created by God rather than them;They make the necessary changes, but the following day they alter it once more, so we should request that they make the necessary changes. prior to signing, they came to our office to give presentations and conduct negotiations; however, even though their office is very close to our office, they can't come to train us to resolve our problems. I personally won't recommend Centrahub Software.
